title: Different Noise, Different Results
description: The diffusion model starts from random noise. Different random starting points lead to different final images, even with the same text prompt.

limitation.title: Limitation:
limitation.text: You get a different result each time you run the model. You can't precisely control the output.

detection.title: Useful for Detection:
detection.text: Identities change, objects morph or disappear. These artifacts help identify AI-generated content.
